title: NASA James Webb Space Telescope
description: A NASA source card about the James Webb Space Telescope and infrared astronomy.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Webb resources explain how the James Webb Space Telescope studies early galaxies, star formation, exoplanet atmospheres, and infrared light from distant objects.
Use this source for students comparing observation tools, wavelengths, evidence, and how engineering choices shape scientific discovery.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, insignia, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
